<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,maximum-scale=1,user-scalable=no,viewport-fit=cover">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#172111">
<title>Cottage Racer: Cottage Cup</title>
<style>
:root{
--cream:#f5edcf;--ink:#15150f;--gold:#f4c842;--orange:#f17d25;--red:#d94b37;
--green:#75c93f;--panel:rgba(16,20,11,.88);--line:#e7debd;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
html,body{margin:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#10170c;color:var(--cream);font-family:Impact,Haettenschweiler,'Arial Narrow Bold',system-ui,sans-serif;touch-action:none;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none}
button{font:inherit;touch-action:manipulation;cursor:pointer}
#app{position:fixed;inset:0;overflow:hidden;background:#172414}
#game{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;display:block}
.hidden{display:none!important}
#menu,#results,#pauseOverlay,#rotateOverlay{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:50;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:18px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 52% 38%,rgba(245,188,54,.18),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(rgba(11,15,8,.48),rgba(8,11,6,.82))}
